metadata.name: Develop Story Idea from Public Data

description: A data journalist browses a city's open data portal looking for potential stories.

nodes.task_description: Scan the city's open data portal for newly released or interesting datasets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a dataset on restaurant health code violations.

nodes.task_description: Download and analyze the dataset, looking for patterns or outliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that violations have increased by 50% in the last year.

nodes.task_description: Formulate a story pitch based on the finding: 'Restaurant health code violations are on the rise across the city.'

expected_outcome.value: A data-driven story idea is developed.
